title: Feature: Hex Dev Audit Trail Wiring Fixes (P0-P1)
description: Wire supervisor quality_result to session, populate completed_steps, forward CodeStepResult metrics to tool_calls, fix session status transition. These are wiring bugs — data exists in supervisor but never flows to session JSON.

phases.name: Wire quality_result + fix status
phases.description: Transfer supervisor QualityReport to session and fix finalize_session status transition

phases.name: Populate completed_steps + forward metrics
phases.description: Populate completed_steps from tier results, forward CodeStepResult to tool_calls

phases.name: Verification
phases.description: Build, test, deploy to Bazzite, verify audit data

steps.description: In tui/mod.rs, after supervisor.run() returns tier_results, call supervisor.to_quality_report(&language) and assign to self.session.quality_result. Save session before finalize_session() is called.
steps.done_condition: session.quality_result is Some(QualityReport) with grade, score, compile_pass after pipeline completes

steps.description: In tui/mod.rs finalize_session(), add fallback: if current_phase reached Code and output_dir has source files, allow Completed even without quality_result. This makes status transition resilient to partial pipeline runs.
steps.done_condition: Session status is 'completed' after successful pipeline run, not 'paused'

steps.description: In tui/mod.rs, after supervisor returns, iterate workplan steps and populate session.completed_steps with step IDs from tiers that had all objectives met (from tier_results). No Supervisor API change needed — extract from returned TierResult data.
steps.done_condition: session.completed_steps contains step IDs matching completed workplan steps

steps.description: In supervisor.rs execute_agent_tracked(), ensure the ToolCall built for session logging includes model, tokens, input_tokens, output_tokens, cost_usd from the CodeStepResult. Check existing log_tool_call path and populate null fields from last_code_selection or dispatch metrics.
steps.done_condition: tool_calls entries for agent-hex-coder have non-null model, tokens, cost_usd

steps.description: Run cargo check --workspace, cargo test -p hex-cli. Deploy to Bazzite, run hex dev start with Go project, verify: quality_result populated, completed_steps populated, status is completed, hex report show displays full audit.
steps.done_condition: All 5 acceptance criteria pass on Bazzite
